templates.description: Blank pgfplots axis with compat=1.18 — start here for any chart or data plot
Multi-series line chart with legend and axis labels — useful for time series, training curves, performance benchmarks, or any continuous-variable comparison
Grouped bar chart with error bars — useful for experimental results, category comparisons, survey data, or any discrete-variable dataset
3D surface with colormap and contour projection — useful for loss landscapes, parameter sensitivity, heatmaps, or any two-variable function visualisation
